summary: INCOMPLETE DELIVERABLE. Critical files missing: PRLabelAssigner.Tests.ps1 (required for TDD), label-config.json (config input). Main script Invoke-PRLabelAssigner.ps1 lacks Set-StrictMode -Version Latest and $ErrorActionPreference='Stop' at module level (lines 1-80). Run-ActTests.ps1 references nonexistent files; would fail immediately. Workflow YAML structurally sound (actionlint likely passes) but cannot execute without test/config files. Task requirement: red/green TDD with Pester tests—not demonstrated. Manual actionlint download (lines 14-20 in workflow) lacks checksum validation and no caching.
